playwrightRegression.command: client: VITE_PORT=5181 npx playwright test cms-publishing.spec.ts cms-publishing-mock-states.spec.ts cms-publishing-crud.spec.ts --reporter=line --workers=1

visualAudit.command: client: VITE_PORT=5182 npx playwright test visual-audit-flow-22-pilot.spec.ts --reporter=line --workers=1

plainLanguageScan.repair: Changed the CMS raw-index panel classification literal from ENGINE_INTERNAL to ADMIN_FACING; the panel remains inside an admin-only details wrapper.

roleCoverageNotes: Anonymous and public-marketplace-visitor render the public reader surface.
Tenant-user renders the authenticated reader surface.
Tenant-admin renders the editorial workflow surface.
Platform-support renders the read-only support inspector.
Business-partner and event-organiser currently render the explicit CMS fallback view; this is documented as partial role coverage for later product expansion.
